flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Illinois Springfield fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Illinois Springfield rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (66.8% → 74.8%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Illinois Springfield rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (37.8% → 41.9%).
